heroDescription: I help BI professionals and analysts master DAX, build efficient data models, and get the most out of Power BI. Through in-depth articles, hands-on courses, and real-world examples.
aboutText2: My goal is to make complex BI concepts accessible and practical — whether you're just starting with Power BI or building advanced DAX patterns for enterprise analytics.
aboutText: With extensive experience in Business Intelligence, I specialize in DAX, data modeling, and the Microsoft BI stack. Currently leading the BI transformation at Tidhar Group, one of Israel's largest real estate groups, I architect enterprise-grade Power BI solutions and drive data-driven decision making across the organization.
